answers.answer: I used a dictionary because it seemed simple, but I cannot explain what input makes the name key unsafe.
The report sorts by quantity first so the most urgent items appear first, then by normalized name to keep equal quantities stable for a reader.
Decimal avoids binary floating point rounding in prices, and the zero Decimal start keeps every sum in the same numeric type.
The loader catches only missing fields and conversion failures so one malformed CSV row does not prevent later valid inventory rows from loading.
